headline: Paramount Gets Warner Bros. Discovery, but Netflix Comes Out a Winner
summary: Paramount has won the bidding war for Warner Bros. Discovery, but it was Netflix stock that soared on the news.

headline: Netflix makes surprising bet on Ben Affleck brand
summary: Ben Affleck has spent years talking publicly about AI and filmmaking. He warned against tools that try to replace human creativity. He said AI cannot write Shakespeare. He drew a clear line between what machines can do and what only people can. What nobody knew was that the whole time, he was ...
